summary: Iteration 135: Modification Summary Display Bug Fix Verification - All tests pass. Verified that formatChangeSummary() in OrganizerDashboard.js now correctly displays DATE changes (not just time), LOCATION changes (with old → new format), DURATION changes, and MEETING_PROVIDER changes. The bug fix is confirmed working.

backend_api_tests.test_03_modifications_mine_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/modifications/mine returns proposals with changes and original_values
backend_api_tests.test_04_modifications_mine_fields_struct: PASS - Returns all required fields for formatChangeSummary
backend_api_tests.test_05_timeline_with_modifications: PASS - Timeline endpoint returns modification data
backend_api_tests.test_07_contractual_fields_in_changes: PASS - CONTRACTUAL_FIELDS (start_datetime, duration_minutes, location, meeting_provider, appointment_type) returned

frontend_tests.dashboard_modifications_section: PASS - 'Modifications en attente (1)' section visible on participant dashboard
frontend_tests.timeline_modification_badges: PASS - 'Action requise' and 'Modification demandée' badges visible on timeline cards
frontend_tests.modification_context_banners: PASS - Context banners show: 'Date : 29 mars → 30 mars · Horaire : 18:00 → 19:00' and 'Durée : 60 → 75 min · Lieu : Paris → Bureau B2'
frontend_tests.date_change_display: PASS - DATE changes now displayed correctly (bug fix verified)
frontend_tests.location_change_display: PASS - LOCATION changes displayed with old → new format
frontend_tests.appointment_detail_banner: PASS - ModificationProposals banner at TOP of detail page
frontend_tests.accept_reject_buttons: PASS - Accept/Reject buttons visible for participant who needs to respond
frontend_tests.no_react_errors: PASS - No React errors in console

verified_bug_fix.bug_description: formatChangeSummary() in OrganizerDashboard.js only displayed time changes (toLocaleTimeString) but ignored DATE changes, LOCATION changes, and MEETING_PROVIDER changes
fix_details: Now compares date separately using toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', {day: 'numeric', month: 'short'})
Now compares time separately using toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', {hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit'})
Displays 'Date : oldDate → newDate' when date changes
Displays 'Horaire : oldTime → newTime' when time changes
Displays 'Lieu : oldLoc → newLoc' for location changes
Displays 'Visio : oldProvider → newProvider' with readable labels (Zoom, Teams, Google Meet)
Displays 'Durée : old → new min' for duration changes

critical_code_review_comments: Date and time are compared separately to detect changes accurately
providerLabels mapping provides user-friendly names for meeting providers
ModificationProposals component correctly positioned at TOP of AppointmentDetail page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with pending modifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modification summary display bug fix verified. formatChangeSummary() in OrganizerDashboard.js now correctly displays DATE, TIME, DURATION, LOCATION, and MEETING_PROVIDER changes. The function compares dates and times separately to detect changes accurately. ModificationProposals banner appears at TOP of AppointmentDetail page with Accept/Reject buttons for users who need to respond. Login route is /signin (not /login).
